THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH A MODIFICATION. NO OPPOSITION FILED, MOTION GRANTED. RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY JANUARY 18, 2024. SANCTIONS OF $750 AWARDED TO THE MOVING PARTY. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANTS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE PRO TEM JUDGE AT DAVIDIDAHO14@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Vacated

Motion For Order Imposing Monetary, Issue And Evidence Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Malcolm E. Barrack
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Off Calendar

Motion To Have Request For Admissionspropounded To Plaintiff Lamisha Green Deemed Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion; Declaration Of Malcolm E. Barrack In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Feb-06-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion; Declaration Of Malcolm E. Barrack In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANTHONY CHIOSSO, Esq. of the Law Offices of Thomas W.J. Purtell (Tel: 415-722-6291) for plaintiffs;
Atty. MALCOLM E. BARRACK, Esq. of Tarkington, O'Neill, Barrack & Chong (Tel: 707-576-1380) for defendants Julie Roberts-Phung and Dan Phung.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JULIE ROBERTS-PHUNG and DAN PHUNG's Motion To Compel Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification, as follows:

No opposition filed, motion granted. Responses to be served by January 18, 2024. Sanctions of $750 awarded to the moving party.

Counsel for defendants to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Set For Trial On Mar-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
